content.speakerText: All set! Thanks for your help.
expectedAnswers: No problem, let me know if you need anything else!
You're welcome! Have a great day!
My pleasure — feel free to reach out if anything comes up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了感谢并主动提供后续支持
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了至少一个场景关键词如 'let me know', 'you're welcome', 'pleasure'

expectedAnswers: You're welcome! I really enjoyed our chat.
It was my pleasure — looking forward to working together again!
Not a problem at all! Hope to see you soon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应感谢并表达积极情感
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用正确
表达自然度：语气友好，符合职场或社交道别语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'you're welcome', 'my pleasure', 'looking forward to' 等地道表达
